title: Angkor Passes Pull in $44.7m in 2025 | Cambodianess
highlights:
2026, 8:50 AM

00:00 / 00:00

- Isa Rohany
- By: PHNOM PENH – The Angkor Enterprise made $44. 7 million from Angkor Passes in 2025. However, this was down seven percent on the 2024 figure, it said in a report. The revenue was generated from tickets sold to 955,131 foreigners, which was down by the same percentage. The report said US visitors accounted for the biggest number, followed by those from the United Kingdom, France, China,  ...    In December, the enterprise brought in $4.2 million, down 29 percent. It received 87,936 foreign clients in the month, a nearly 30-percent decline. The enterprise donated over $1.9 million from the revenue to the Cambodia Kantha Bopha Foundation. title: More than $35 Million Generated through Angkor Pass Sales in 10 ...
highlights:
The Angkor Pass admission ticket sales for the Angkor Archaeological Park have brought in over $35 million in the first 10 months of 2025, which represents a decline by 1. 15 percent compared to the same period in 2024. This year, a total of 765,518 tourists purchased the Angkor Pass from January through October, according to the Angkor  ... Established in 2016, Angkor Enterprise runs the Angkor ticket sale service with the Ministry of Economy and Finance overseeing the financial operations and the Ministry of Tourism the technical side.
